title: Dr Abhishek Gohel
subtitle: Neurologist and epileptologist based in Ahmedabad, with training across internal medicine, neurology, and advanced epilepsy care.
summary: Public-facing CV example built from professional profile details and training history, with private personal contact data intentionally omitted.

body: Consultant neurologist with a focus on epilepsy and advanced neurodiagnostic workflows.
Part of the team that co-established the drug-refractory epilepsy service.
items: Evaluation and management of complex neurology and epilepsy cases
VEEG and SEEG planning and analysis
Neuromodulation workflows including DBS and VNS
MRI brain post-processing and intraoperative neuromonitoring

experience.institution: Amrita Advanced Centre for Epilepsy, Kochi
items: Implantation planning and epilepsy case conferences
Clinical training across acute and chronic neurological disorders
Academic work including seminars, journal clubs, and investigative procedures

experience.institution: Smt. NHL Municipal Medical College, Ahmedabad
items: Outpatient and inpatient care in internal medicine
Early training in systemic and acute medical case management

education.institution: Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences, Kochi

expertise: Status epilepticus and critical care neurology
skills: Organised AACECON 2023 in Kochi, focused on MRI-negative epilepsies
publications: Systemic inflammatory syndrome in COVID-19 – SISCoV study: systematic review and meta-analysis (Pediatric Research)
Non-multiple-sclerosis-related typical and atypical white matter disorders: experience from a tertiary care center in India
Beware of the cortical ribboning: the spectrum – experience from a case series
Ramsay Hunt syndrome leading to brainstem and cerebellar involvement: a rare co-occurrence
Acute necrotizing encephalopathy as a complication of chikungunya infection
Sacral osteoid osteoma: a rare cause of inflammatory back pain and sacroiliitis in a young man
AI-CoV Study: autoimmune encephalitis associated with COVID-19 and its vaccines – a systematic review
Chapter author: Intraoperative Neuromonitoring in Pediatric Scoliosis Surgery
achievements: All India Rank 4 in the NIMHANS DM Neurology entrance examination in 2018
Also secured a DM Neurology seat at SCTIMST in 2018
Topped the theory paper of the AIIMS DM Neurology examination in 2018
Secured Grade A in clinical work and academics at NIMHANS
